TikTok is testing an AI likeness detection tool
articles.description: TikTok is starting to test an opt-in tool that scans for AI likenesses and lets creators report them to the company, as spotted by social media consultant Matt Navarra. The tool is initially being tested with "some" US creators, TikTok US spokesperson Zachary Kizer tells The Verge. YouTube has been working on a similar tool […]

articles.title: Apple’s plot to crush OpenAI
articles.description: Apple is suing OpenAI. The complaint is readable and intense, as these things often are, though many experts seem to think many of the allegations are just the ways things are done. So what does Apple really want here, and why is it picking such a public fight with OpenAI? On this episode of The […]

articles.title: New York governor says she’s using AI to analyze ‘every single rule’ in the state
articles.description: New York Governor Kathy Hochul might have just signed a moratorium on new AI data centers in the state, but she's not against using the technology herself. During an interview with Bloomberg's Odd Lots podcast, Hochul said that her team is using "AI to analyze every single rule, regulation, [and] policy" to check for outdated […]

articles.title: Google is renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
articles.description: Google is giving its AI note-taking app a new name. The company announced on Thursday that NotebookLM is becoming Gemini Notebook, but will remain a standalone app even as it integrates more deeply across Gemini and Google Search. Google first revealed Gemini Notebook - then called Project Tailwind - in May 2023 before widely releasing […]

articles.title: Claude can now use your 1Password credentials for you
articles.description: 1Password has launched a new browser integration for Claude that allows the Anthropic chatbot to access stored security credentials like usernames and passwords. The 1Password for Claude feature means that users can authorize Claude to complete multi-step tasks like booking travel and managing online accounts on their behalf without having to manually input their login […]

articles.title: Google ordered to open Android and Search to rivals in Europe
articles.description: Google must give rival AI assistants and search engines greater access to key parts of Android and Google Search after the European Union ordered the company to comply with the bloc's digital antitrust rules. The two decisions, handed down Thursday, could weaken Google's control over two of the tech industry's most important platforms and have […]

articles.title: Computer cops
articles.description: I stood before a hulking glass and brick structure in the heart of Fort Worth, Texas. Thousands gathered inside to see what had been billed as "the future of policing in the digital age." As press, I was prohibited from entering, but from a number of nearby locations, I met with attendees who told me […]

items.title: 苹果正式起诉 OpenAI
items.summary: 苹果正式起诉 OpenAI，引发业界对其在人工智能领域竞争意图的广泛关注。

items.title: Google 将 NotebookLM 更名为 Gemini Notebook
items.summary: Google 将 AI 笔记应用 NotebookLM 更名为 Gemini Notebook，并深化与 Gemini 的整合。

items.title: Claude 可调用 1Password 凭证执行任务
items.summary: Claude 集成 1Password 新功能，可代用户完成多步骤登录及旅行预订等任务。

items.title: TikTok 测试 AI 形象检测工具
items.summary: TikTok 正在测试 AI 形象检测工具，允许创作者举报未经授权的 AI 模拟形象。

items.title: Vertu 向高管推介高价 AI 代理
items.summary: 据报道，Vertu 正面向企业高管推介售价 6880 美元的 AI 代理服务。

items.title: Databricks 估值达 1880 亿美元
items.summary: 据报道，Databricks 估值达到 1880 亿美元，继续成为 AI 领域备受青睐的投资标的。

items.title: Google 在欧洲被判令开放 Android 和搜索业务
items.summary: Google 在欧洲被判令向竞争对手开放 Android 和搜索业务，涉及 AI 助手公平接入。

items.title: Zoox 因自动驾驶出租车遇浓烟混乱发起软件召回
items.summary: Zoox 因自动驾驶出租车在浓烟中出现运行混乱而发起软件召回。

items.title: 纽约州州长使用 AI 分析全州法规
items.summary: 纽约州州长表示，其团队正使用人工智能分析全州所有规则、法规和政策。

items.title: AI 驱动内存需求冲击印度智能手机市场
items.summary: 据报道，由 AI 驱动的内存需求激增正在对印度智能手机市场造成显著冲击。

summary.discussion_topic: 如果 AI 助手能代你完成登录、订票等繁琐操作，你是否愿意把密码库授权给它管理？
